title: Youbin He
text: Remote Sensing Algorithm Engineer and prospective M.S./Ph.D. applicant in GeoAI, AI for Remote Sensing, Ecological Remote Sensing, Wildfire Risk Modeling, and Spatial Machine Learning.

title: Research & Projects
text: Overview page for Featured Research, Applied Remote Sensing & AI4RS Projects, and Additional GIS & Spatial Analysis.

title: Featured Research
text: Wildfire monitoring, post-fire ecological assessment, spatially explainable fire driver analysis, and wildfire prediction modeling in Southwest China.

title: Applied Remote Sensing & AI4RS Projects
text: AI for Remote Sensing and public-safe applied remote sensing projects including scene classification, satellite preprocessing, operational monitoring workflows, agricultural monitoring, and crop-yield estimation.

title: Additional GIS & Spatial Analysis
text: GIScience projects covering multiscale spatial patterns of homestay development in Liangshan Prefecture and integrated assessment of urban development quality in Jinan City.

title: Publications
text: Manuscript under review and conference papers in SPIE and IEEE proceedings.

title: Professional Experience Overview
text: Public-safe professional experience overview for operational remote sensing engineering, satellite preprocessing, wildfire monitoring, agricultural monitoring, yield estimation, and product generation.

title: Recent Work
text: Recent public-safe engineering and research directions including fire detection preprocessing, remote sensing product generation, crop growth workflows, and explainable GeoAI.

title: Multi-sensor Satellite Preprocessing Pipelines
text: Public-safe multi-sensor preprocessing workflows for GF-series imagery, Sentinel-2, AQUA/MODIS, and NOAA-20 VIIRS data preparation.

title: Operational Remote Sensing Systems
text: Operational remote sensing product generation for wildfire-relevant environmental monitoring and agro-meteorological applications.

title: Agricultural Monitoring and Yield Estimation
text: Crop growth assessment and county-level yield estimation workflows using remote sensing indicators, meteorological variables, statistical records, and spatial data.

title: Open Resources and GitHub Resources
text: Future public resources, GitHub repositories, reproducible research examples, Python geospatial processing, machine learning, SHAP, GeoShapley, PyTorch, and Google Earth Engine.

title: Contact
text: Email, GitHub, Google Scholar, ORCID, and LinkedIn contact links for Youbin He.
